pr.title: TrigramHash + XSA + TTT on thwu1 SOTA stack - val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Combines trigram hash embeddings with bigram budget rebalancing, last-layer exclusive self-attention, EMA, and test-time SGD tuning before eval.
techniques: - Trigram hash plus reduced bigram embeddings to enrich tokenization
- Exclusive self-attention applied in final layers for cleaner context signals
- EMA weights with frozen-layer test-time SGD over validation tokens
